rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Consult a healthcare professional before starting any diet or exercise program.

description.short: Calculate daily water intake needs based on weight and activity.
description.long: Calculate daily water intake needs based on weight and activity.

short_i18n.en: Calculate daily water intake needs based on weight and activity.
short_i18n.tr: Günlük baz ve aktivite kaynaklı su kaybını telafi eden minimum su miktarını hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den täglichen Wasserbedarf basierend auf Gewicht und Aktivität.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer les besoins quotidiens en eau en fonction du poids et de l'activité.
short_i18n.es: Calcular las necesidades diarias de ingesta de agua según el peso y la actividad.
short_i18n.ar: احسب احتياجات تناول الماء اليومية بناءً على الوزن والنشاط.

title_i18n.es: Calculadora de necesidad de consumo de agua
